description_long: This perfume object consists of a rounded, two-part bottle with a matte beige base and a textured brown cap resembling a natural stone or cork. The bottle sits on a flat, polygonal tray, accompanied by three pastel-colored, teardrop-shaped objects and three brown, disc-like items with white sticks, possibly representing decorative or aromatic accessories. A conical incense holder with several black incense sticks is also present on the tray, adding to the object's ceremonial or decorative appearance. The overall arrangement suggests a harmonious blend of natural and crafted elements, with soft, muted colors and simple geometric forms. The bottle's cap appears removable and is the tallest feature, while the tray provides a stable support for all components. No visible branding or text is present on any part of the object.
description: A rounded beige perfume bottle with a textured brown cap sits on a polygonal tray, surrounded by pastel teardrop shapes, brown discs with sticks, and a conical incense holder with black sticks.
description_view_0: The front view shows the bottle with its brown cap, the conical incense holder with black sticks, three brown discs with white sticks, and three pastel teardrop shapes arranged on the tray.
description_view_1: This view highlights the incense holder and the arrangement of the brown discs and pastel teardrop shapes, with the bottle partially obscured behind the incense holder.
description_view_2: From this angle, the brown cap of the bottle is prominent, with the incense holder and pastel teardrop shapes clearly visible to the left.
description_view_3: The bottle's cap and incense holder are seen from the side, with the brown discs and pastel teardrop shapes spread out on the tray in the foreground.
attribute_bottle_cap_design: The bottle cap is rounded, dome-shaped, and textured to resemble natural stone or cork. It is brown in color, appears to be removable, and sits atop the bottle, providing a natural, earthy aesthetic.
attribute_bottle_silhouette: The bottle has a rounded, bulbous silhouette with a slightly narrower neck and a dome-shaped cap, creating a soft, organic outline with gentle curves and symmetry.
attribute_decorative_elements: brown disc-shaped accessories with white sticks
